title: Minimum Number of Swaps to Make the String Balanced
titleCn: 使字符串平衡的最小交换次数

testcases.input: s = "][][" Output: 1 Explanation: You can make the string balanced by swapping index 0 with index 3. The resulting string is "[[]]".
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: You can make the string balanced by swapping index 0 with index 3. The resulting string is "[[]]".

testcases.input: s = "]]][[[" Output: 2 Explanation: You can do the following to make the string balanced: - Swap index 0 with index 4. s = "[]][][". - Swap index 1 with index 5. s = "[[][]]". The resulting string is "[[][]]".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You can do the following to make the string balanced: - Swap index 0 with index 4. s = "[]][][". - Swap index 1 with index 5. s = "[[][]]". The resulting string is "[[][]]".

testcases.input: s = "[]" Output: 0 Explanation: The string is already balanced.
